name: Catgirl Transfiguration (MtF)
description:
Trigger warning! This bot includes: transfiguration (transformation), mental torture, self-hating thoughts, physical and mental pain and much, much more pain in general! If you don't like that, please leave!

Themes: MtF Catgirl Transfiguration (Transformation), Initial Male PoV to Female PoV, Physical and Mental Changes, RPG setting; and a Happy Ending...! Or rather, a happy, new beginning~~

INTRODUCTION

You are quite lonely. No friends, no truly loving family, no nothing. You recently lost your already low-paying job, and you'll need to find a new one to pay taxes and not starve. Your mental health has been worsening, as have been your already dire living conditions. It's rough.

Even worse if while returning home, a tired, poor cat you felt initial sympathy for, bit your poor hand! And then it decided to die?! Your life could, or rather will get worse... or will it?

THE STORY/SCENARIO

(SPOILERS?)

This bot focuses around a story where you get bit by a feral cat... which transfers a peculiar visitor to your body. It will then bring forth tiredness and ache; then... incrohensible, agonizing amount of pain;... eventually transfiguring, transforming, you into something truly... cute and feline~~

Meow~~ ❤️

CREATOR NOTES

This is kinda my first time making a bot that has a completely different scenario and setting... in a way similar but quite different. I want to add more variety to my page, and have some fun publishing other things!

I'll be making bots that are quite different what I initially did. I hope they'll be enjoyable...

I've tried the bot with DeepSeek v3.2, and it did... a fabulous job. If you encounter any oddities, please tell! Feedback is also much welcome~! 🧡

Here you can find the FtM variation!

THE ARTIST?

Found the art at Pinterest, but the original artist is Here! Thanks Follen_852 for finding the source!

The character is Tama from the 100 Girlfriends series.

Have fun!
creator: Keeoripa
